situation: moni-master frontend lacks Content-Security-Policy header in both dev server and production build. Without CSP, XSS via injected external script/style is unmitigated. Audit finding FE-M-002 (medium severity) pending dispatch since audit-2026-07-07-030 completed.
action: Added CSP + X-Content-Type-Options + Referrer-Policy headers to vite.config.ts (dev server via server.headers) and index.html <meta> tags (production builds). Dev policy allows 'unsafe-inline' for Vite HMR bootstrap; prod policy stricter (no unsafe-inline in script-src). connect-src whitelists ws/http 127.0.0.1:8000 for backend proxy.
outcome_evidence: commit 3cf67e8 on auto/opt-frontend-1783366395 pushed to origin; git diff shows +11 lines vite.config.ts (headers block), +7 lines index.html (3 meta tags); TypeScript compiles clean (no syntax error in defineConfig).
next_suggestion: 派生下一条 pending finding FE-M-003 (localStorage plaintext API key storage); or if batched, FE-L-001 route splat 404 feedback.
